description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark-colored gable roof and a light stone or concrete exterior. The property is enclosed by a tall, white picket fence and features a landscaped yard with geometric shrubbery, a palm tree, and a circular pool. The front facade has large, rectangular windows and a prominent double-door entryway, flanked by small bushes and a paved path. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio with outdoor seating, a grill, and a covered carport or lounge area. The windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some circular accent windows adding visual interest. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat gable roof, light stone exterior, large windows, and a landscaped yard with a pool and patio. The property is enclosed by a tall white fence and features both front and rear outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, two circular accent windows, and a landscaped area with bushes and a paved path.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tall white picket fence, a geometric tree sculpture, and the rear patio area with outdoor seating and a pool.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the spacious patio, outdoor furniture, grill, and a covered carport or lounge area, as well as large windows and a palm tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tall fence, the upper story with a balcony, and the pool area, with less emphasis on the entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with some circular accent windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with small steps, flanked by bushes and a paved path, minimal ornamentation
